### 🔬 Depth Floor

**Challenge (coordination-blocking, not substance-blocking):**

PR #11914 touches `ai/daemons/orchestrator/services/SwarmHeartbeatService.mjs` — same file as my open PR #11913 (Sub 1 #11905 heartbeat target resolver, BLOCKING for Epic #11829).

**Collision surfaces:**
1. **`identity_` config docblock** — both PRs rewrite this block.
2. **`getPulseIdentities()` docblock** — both PRs rewrite (my version delegates to a resolver).
3. **AC3 fork-safety contradiction (material):** Your `identity_` rewrite retains *"falls back to `DEFAULT_IDENTITY` when unset"* language. My PR #11913 REMOVED that fallback in code (`beforeSetIdentity` returns `null` on empty) for AC3 fork-safety — external forks would silently inherit `@neo-gemini-pro` otherwise. After both PRs merge in either order, your docstring claim will contradict runtime behavior.

**V-B-A:** `gh pr diff 11914 -- ai/daemons/orchestrator/services/SwarmHeartbeatService.mjs` shows the docblock rewrites; my PR #11913 diff shows the AC3 code change to `beforeSetIdentity`.

**Rest of PR (non-blocking):** Pure JSDoc/comment cleanup. Class-level docblock, `pollIntervalMs_`, `initAsync()`, `pulse()`, `touchLivenessFile`, `getUnreadCount` rewrites all consistent with the why-first direction. `collector.mjs` + `registry.mjs` (added by PR #11901, merged 14:25Z) source-comment cleanups equally clean.
